summary: Iteration 37 - Complete testing of Subscriptions Dashboard feature. All backend tests passed (12/12). All UI components verified via Playwright. Features tested: 1) GET /api/super-admin/subscriptions-dashboard API, 2) Subscriptions tab in Super Admin panel, 3) 4 Summary cards (active, expiring soon, expired, expected revenue), 4) Expiring soon section, 5) Expired subscriptions section, 6) Subscription types distribution section.
passed_tests: Response structure - has all required keys (summary, subscription_types, expected_revenue, expiring_soon_list, expired_list, subscription_prices)
Summary section - has total_tenants, active_subscriptions, expiring_soon, already_expired, days_before_alert
Subscription types structure - each type has count, active, expired fields
Expected revenue structure - has from_expiring, from_active, total_monthly, details
Subscription prices - basic=50000, premium=100000, trial=0, demo=0 IQD/month
Expiring soon list - returns list with days_left field
Expired list - returns list with days_expired field
Summary counts consistency - total_tenants equals sum of subscription type counts
Revenue calculation logic - total_monthly equals from_active
UI: Subscriptions tab visible and clickable in Super Admin panel
UI: 4 Summary cards displayed (active subscriptions, expiring soon, expired, expected monthly revenue)
UI: Expiring soon section shows empty state message when no expiring subscriptions
UI: Expired subscriptions section shows empty state message when no expired subscriptions
UI: Subscription types distribution shows breakdown by type (premium: 2, trial: 1)

subscriptions_tab_ui.location: Super Admin panel > إدارة العملاء > الاشتراكات tab
components: 4 Summary cards with icons and counts
Expiring soon section with tenant list or empty state
Expired subscriptions section with tenant list or empty state
Expected revenue from renewals (shown when there are expiring subscriptions)

cards: قارب على الانتهاء (Expiring soon) - orange theme
إيراد شهري متوقع (Expected monthly revenue) - purple theme

critical_code_review_comments: Subscriptions dashboard API is fully implemented with comprehensive data
API correctly filters out demo tenants from the dashboard
Days calculation for expiring/expired subscriptions is accurate
Revenue calculation uses correct subscription prices
UI correctly shows/hides sections based on data availability
Empty states are properly displayed when no data exists
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_subscriptions_dashboard_iter37.py - Created comprehensive test suite for subscriptions dashboard
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing tenants for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 completed successfully. Subscriptions Dashboard feature fully verified: 1) API endpoint GET /api/super-admin/subscriptions-dashboard returns comprehensive subscription data including summary stats, subscription types breakdown, expected revenue calculations, and lists of expiring/expired subscriptions. 2) UI shows 4 summary cards (active, expiring soon, expired, expected revenue), expiring soon section, expired subscriptions section, and subscription types distribution. 3) Default subscription prices: basic=50000, premium=100000 IQD/month. 4) Empty states are properly displayed when no expiring/expired subscriptions exist.
